Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0160",
  "title": "2、投放数据优化，引导高 LTV的用户获取：",
  "page_index": 95,
  "page_range": "95"
}

Section text:
2、投放数据优化，引导高 LTV的用户获取：
实现投放策略的实时迭代，提升高价值用户的捕捉精度，改变以往“拼渠道、拼预算”的传统营销竞争逻辑；

message.content:
This section can answer questions regarding:
- **Topics:** Advertising data optimization, high LTV user acquisition, and shifts in marketing competition logic.
- **Entities/Concepts:** LTV (Lifetime Value), high-value users, advertising strategies, real-time iteration, traditional marketing models (channel/budget competition).
- **Definitions:** Not explicitly provided in this section.
- **Procedures:** Utilizing data optimization to enable real-time iteration of advertising strategies for targeted user acquisition.
- **Claims:** Data-driven strategy iteration increases precision in capturing high-value users and moves marketing competition away from traditional reliance on channels and budgets.
- **Metrics:** LTV, user capture precision.
- **Dates/Tables/Figures/Evidence Types:** None mentioned in this section.
